title: One More Set
lore: The encore nobody asked for and everybody needed — Dua Lift-a loops the chorus until the house lights pretend they're strobes.
artistPersona: Pop-disco producer for the gym floor — every drop is a rep, every chorus is a PR. Instrumental only; no celebrity faces.
albumConcept: Dua Lift-a's HIIT gospel — silver disco for the gym floor, every track counts reps in four-on-the-floor.
